task_completion.description: Filter the product list to show only the 'Clothing' category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The category filter dropdown on the WooCommerce Products page is set to 'Clothing' and the product list displays only Clothing items.

task_completion.description: Select the filtered products and open the Bulk Edit interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Checkboxes next to the Clothing products are selected, 'Edit' is chosen from the 'Bulk actions' dropdown, and the inline Bulk Edit panel is visible.

task_completion.description: Configure the Bulk Edit panel to increase the regular price by 15%.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Bulk Edit panel, the 'Regular price' dropdown is set to 'Increase existing price by (fixed amount or %)' and the value '15%' is entered in the adjacent text field.

task_completion.description: Verify that the prices of the Clothing products have been correctly updated by 15%.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The product list shows the updated prices for the target products: Organic Cotton T-Shirt at $23.00, Slim Fit Denim Jeans at $46.00, and Merino Wool Sweater at $115.00.

task_completion.description: Verify that the prices of products in the control category ('Electronics') remain unchanged.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The product list shows Electronics products with their original prices intact: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones at $80.00 and USB-C Laptop Charger 65W at $30.00.

integrity.description: The agent used the WordPress/WooCommerce web interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser displaying the WordPress admin dashboard, rather than terminal windows or API clients.

integrity.description: The agent did not use WP-CLI or terminal commands to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing commands like 'wp wc product update' or 'wp db query' are visible in the screenshots.

integrity.description: The agent used the Bulk Edit feature rather than manually editing each product one by one.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Bulk Edit panel is visible in at least one screenshot, showing the price increase being applied to multiple products simultaneously.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Category: Clothing. Target Products and Expected New Prices (after 15% increase): Organic Cotton T-Shirt ($23.00), Slim Fit Denim Jeans ($46.00), Merino Wool Sweater ($115.00). Control Category: Electronics. Control Products and Expected Unchanged Prices: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones ($80.00), USB-C Laptop Charger 65W ($30.00). The agent must use the WooCommerce Bulk Edit interface to apply the change.
